mp_high_volatility_desc: Sotuvlar juda tebranib turadi ({{percent}}%). Zaxira rejalashtirish qiyinlashadi.
mp_weekly_pattern_desc: Eng ko'p sotuv: {{best}}. Eng kam: {{worst}}. {{best}} kunida aksiyalar rejalashtiring.

aia_recommendations_desc: Moliyaviy holatni yaxshilash uchun amaliy qadamlar
